items.summary: From app-controlled security to electronic shifting and radar alerts, Segway’s Myon may have more tech than you need. That’s not always a bad thing.

items.title: Jeff Bezos Is Funding a Wild Hunt for the Brain’s ‘Core Algorithm’
items.summary: With $500 million in funding and a reported $2.5 billion valuation, Flourish wants to reinvent AI by putting real neurons under the microscope.

items.title: Quantum Computing Is Having Its Public Market Moment
items.summary: Quantinuum, a quantum computing startup, is losing millions. Investors want in anyway.
